overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt running along a dark wilderness path at night. The scene transitions from moonlit skies to views of a distinctive glowing blue mountain peak as the character progresses through the mountainous terrain.

events.description: glowing blue mountain peak becomes visible on the right horizon
full moon exits upper frame as camera continues forward

agents.ego_description: Geralt running steadily along the dirt path with two swords visible on his back, heading toward the distant mountain range

entered.detail: large bright full moon illuminating the night sky
faint red light source visible in the distant left background
narrow dirt trail winding through the mountainous terrain
dark silhouetted mountains forming the horizon line
dark trees and bushes lining the left side of the path
dark trees and bushes lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt running along a dark mountain trail under a bright full moon. A distant red glow appears on the left horizon, while the glowing blue mountain peak emerges into view on the right as the character progresses forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with glowing peak visible

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the path with the glowing mountain now prominently visible on the right side

entered.detail: distinctive mountain peak emitting blue-green ethereal light from its summit

segments.scene_description: With the moon no longer visible, the glowing blue mountain dominates the right side of the frame as Geralt continues running along the dirt path. The landscape remains dark and open with sparse vegetation lining the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain path with glowing landmark

events.description: path curves slightly to the left as the character continues toward the glowing mountain

agents.ego_description: running along the curving path with the glowing mountain remaining visible on the right, maintaining steady pace through the wilderness

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt continuing his run as the path curves gently leftward. The glowing mountain shifts toward the right background while remaining a prominent landmark, and the dark mountainous wilderness stretches ahead under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark mountain wilderness that shifts from a moonlit trail to a landscape dominated by a glowing blue peak. It begins with Geralt running along a dirt path under a bright full moon, with a distant red glow on the left horizon and a luminous blue mountain emerging on the right. As the moon disappears from view, the glowing peak becomes the primary focal point against the dark, open terrain and sparse vegetation. The scene then shifts as the path curves gently leftward, causing the mountain to recede into the right background while the vast, dark wilderness stretches forward under the night sky.
